overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, futuristic vehicles, and reflective wet pavement. The footage is clearly from a video game engine (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and atmospheric effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy neon-lit intersection with yellow crosswalk

events.description: futuristic purple truck with bright headlights passes from left to right
black compact car drives past followed by a teal sports car
begin walking forward across the wet crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for traffic to clear, then beginning to walk across the intersection

notable_agents.action: purple armored truck driving through the intersection with headlights glaring
teal sports car waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
tall skyscraper covered in vertical neon advertisements and holographic displays
tall palm tree silhouetted against the neon city lights
modern glass office building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Standing at a rain-soaked intersection in a cyberpunk city, waiting for futuristic vehicles to pass. The camera is positioned on a yellow striped crosswalk surrounded by towering glass buildings covered in neon advertisements. The purple truck and other vehicles drive through the intersection before the camera begins to move forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner transitioning to elevated sidewalk

events.description: stepping off the asphalt crosswalk onto the concrete sidewalk
white sedan with blue underglow passes by on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection and stepping up onto the sidewalk next to an orange retaining wall

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket and white shoes walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
white sedan driving past on the street below

entered.detail: wet concrete pavement reflecting the neon lights
tall curved concrete wall with orange surface treatment
tall street light with multiple lamps illuminating the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving from the open intersection onto a concrete sidewalk bordered by an orange retaining wall. A pedestrian in a red jacket approaches from the opposite direction. The neon tower remains visible ahead while the crosswalk falls behind. The wet pavement creates strong reflections of the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing passes close to camera on the right side
approaching the illuminated pedestrian overpass ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and approaching the overpass

notable_agents.action: person in dark jacket walking past the camera on the right
silhouetted figure walking toward camera in the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: elevated glass-enclosed pedestrian bridge spanning across the street ahead
large glowing billboard with colorful animated advertisements on the wall
illuminated shop windows with neon signage

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow sidewalk bordered by an orange wall on the left and storefronts on the right. The pedestrian overpass looms ahead, illuminated from within. Other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and the wet concrete reflects the surrounding neon advertisements and street lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated pedestrian bridge

events.description: passing underneath the pedestrian overpass, entering the covered area
red sports car speeds past on the street below

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk under the overpass, with the structure creating a canopy overhead

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking toward camera under the overpass
red sports car with headlights on driving past on the street below

entered.detail: thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated pedestrian bridge, which creates a semi-covered canopy over the sidewalk. The lighting becomes more mixed with shadows from the overpass structure. Support pillars line the walkway, and the wet concrete continues to reflect the neon lights from the surrounding buildings and advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide, neon-lit city intersection into the sheltered shadows of an elevated pedestrian walkway. It begins on a yellow striped crosswalk, pausing as a purple truck and other futuristic vehicles pass between towering glass buildings draped in glowing advertisements. As the camera moves forward, the open intersection gives way to a concrete sidewalk bordered by an orange retaining wall, where the wet pavement creates vivid reflections of the surrounding lights while a pedestrian in a red jacket passes by. The scene then narrows as the camera walks past storefronts toward a looming, illuminated overpass, with the environment shifting from an open street to a confined urban corridor. Finally, the movement leads beneath the elevated bridge, where the bright neon glow is tempered by the mixed shadows of the canopy and support pillars.
